message:
bd-1lg.12: Animation physics engine tests and tracing span

Add animation.tick tracing span to Spring behind cfg(feature="tracing"),
time-step independence tests, damping mode comparison tests (critically
damped settles fastest, overdamped no oscillation, underdamped oscillates
then settles), zero-displacement handling, and 4 property-based spring
convergence tests.

Tests: 58 unit (56 + 2 tracing) + 48 integration (44 + 4 proptest)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -49,6 +49,7 @@ criterion = { version = "0.8.2", features = ["html_reports"] }
 # For spike PTY tests
 portable-pty = "0.9.0"
 proptest = "1.7.0"
+tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3.20", features = ["registry"] }
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "read_optimized_bench"
